headline: AXIOS: AMAZON CEO JASSY BRIEFED TREASURY'S BESSENT THAT AMAZON RESEARCHERS JAILBROKE FABLE 5 — TRIGGERING WHITE HOUSE BAN ON ANTHROPIC
ANTHROPIC'S OWN LARGEST INVESTOR HELPED GET ITS FLAGSHIP MODELS BANNED — AMAZON CONFLICT-OF-INTEREST ANGLE EMERGES
FABLE 5 AND MYTHOS 5 STILL DARK 24H+ AFTER EXPORT ORDER — ANTHROPIC CALLS IT A 'MISUNDERSTANDING', NO RESTORATION
UNVERIFIED: '3.4TB FABLE 5 TORRENT' CLAIM TRENDS POST-BAN — NO MAGNET, NO HASH, NO CREDIBLE CONFIRMATION
